title: perityle reinana
intro: Perityle reinana, also known as Desert Marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Perityle reinana include its ability to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, from respiratory problems to digestive issues.
